mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN admin_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id IN (${roleIds}) AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
